_comment: Email filter ruleset template. Copy to <repo>/_config/email-filters.json and customise.
_doc: Rules are evaluated in order with AND semantics (all match predicates must match). First match wins per source per tick run.

rules.name: Dispute counsel correspondence
rules._comment: Example: attach emails from dispute counsel to the dispute case as privileged evidence

rules.name: Contract review emails
rules._comment: Example: emails with 'contract' in subject from legal team → attach to contract case
